steps.t: Dalagín, the Dumûri captain, has asked you to enter Eshadûr and disrupt the Ordâkhai operations there.
Dalagín, the Dumûri captain, has asked you to enter Eshadûr and destroy their boats, defeat Ordâkhai soldiers, and scout a few locations.
You have completed your mission in Eshadûr and should return to Dalagín in Iridír.
You have completed your mission there and reported back to Dalagín, the Dumûri captain, in Iridír. She has asked you to go to Girhâzi and tell her of …
